{{Infobox technique
| name = Lightning Spear
| introduced = City of Light
}}

''See also: [[Lightning Spear Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Lightning [[Spear]] is a powerful weapon used by [[Leah]] that possesses physical characteristics of [[steel]], black wood, gold, and [[ruby]]. When thrown, the object travels with much greater force than a normal human throw and moves at extreme speeds, appearing as a blur or a streak of dark lightning. The weapon is capable of significant destruction, such as punching holes through stone tiles to create craters in a throne room. While the spear is designed to obey [[Leah]]'s commands and return to her hand, it can be seized by an [[Incarnation]], at which point the weapon struggles to respond to its original owner. Using the spear appears to take a heavy physical toll on [[Leah]], making subsequent uses feel potentially fatal.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] initially carries the tall Lightning [[Spear]] in her right hand before leaving it to rest against a nearby wall. Although [[Zakareth]]'s daughter had kept the weapon for several weeks, [[King]] [[Zakareth]] eventually wields it to blast through ground and tiles. The spear is a weapon used by [[Zakareth]], though it was also once held in an iron grip by [[Leah's father]]. During a confrontation, the weapon is used to attack [[King]] [[Zakareth]], who manages to catch a spear in his palm. [[Leah]] also demonstrates the ability to pull the Lightning [[Spear]] out of nowhere, and it is noted as a weapon held by [[King Zakareth the Sixth]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] carries the [[Lightning Spear]] in her right hand.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] holds a tall [[Lightning Spear]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Lightning Spear]] is resting against a wall near [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Zakareth]]'s daughter has kept his [[Lightning Spear]] for weeks.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[King]] [[Zakareth]] wields the [[Lightning Spear]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lightning Spear]] is a weapon that can blast through tiles and ground.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] can pull the [[Lightning Spear]] out of nowhere.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lightning Spear]] is a weapon held by [[King Zakareth the Sixth]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[King]] [[Zakareth]] catches a [[Lightning Spear]] in his palm.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lightning Spear]] is a weapon used by [[Zakareth]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah's father]] held the [[Lightning Spear]] in an iron grip.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Lightning Spear]] was used to attack [[King]] [[Zakareth]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
